message:
feat(core): MemBacking for memory streams, split buffer cursors, wide string extensions, and POSIX regex engine

- stdio/file: add MemBacking enum (Fixed for fmemopen, Dynamic for
  open_memstream) with position-tracked read/write/seek operations
- stdio/buffer: split single pos/filled into separate read_pos/read_filled
  and write_len cursors to correctly support bidirectional streams
- stdio/mod: export MemBacking from public API
- string/wide: add wcpcpy, wcpncpy, wcscasecmp, wcsncasecmp, wmemrchr
- string/regex: new clean-room Thompson NFA regex engine supporting BRE
  and ERE per POSIX.1-2017 with leftmost-longest match semantics
- string/mod: re-export new wide string and regex symbols
- ctype: add proptest property-based tests for classification invariants,
  case-conversion roundtrips, and to_ascii bit-masking

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
